title: Compute sizing for Databricks Apps is now generally available
body:
Compute sizing for Databricks Apps is now generally available. Choose between Medium (2 vCPUs, 6 GB) and Large (4 vCPUs, 12 GB) compute sizes to match your workload requirements.

See [Configure compute resources for a Databricks app](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/compute-size).

App compute sizing is coming soon to workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled.

ref_links.text: Configure compute resources for a Databricks app
